movie.actors: John Goodman, Elizabeth Perkins, Rick Moranis, Rosie O'Donnell
movie.plot: In this live-action feature of the cartoon show, Fred Flintstone finally gets the job he's always wanted, but it may just come at a price.
movie.title: The Flintstones
movie.writer: Tom S. Parker, Jim Jennewein, Steven E. de Souza
